name: AMD
rationale: Starter long only. AMD is the only candidate that clears the live momentum gate with mom_1m +10.94% and mom_3m +133.56%. It also has two dated catalysts ahead: Advancing AI 2026 on July 23 and fiscal Q2 2026 results on Aug. 4. The main risk is that semiconductors sold off on July 8 as investors questioned the durability of the AI trade, so the size stays small and the stop is hard. ([amd.com](http
